articles.title: King Charles reveals he paid £12.9m in tax for 2024-25
articles.description: The King becomes first monarch to publish their tax payments - with the figures putting him among the UK's top 100 taxpayers.

articles.title: King and Queen will not live in Buckingham Palace after renovations
articles.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla will continue to reside in Clarence House, Buckingham Palace says.

articles.title: Rescuers search rubble for survivors as Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 235
articles.description: At least 4,300 people have been injured after two seven-plus magnitude shallow quakes hit seconds apart.

articles.title: Red heat warning for south-east after UK sees warmest day of year
articles.description: Temperatures reach 36.7C in Merryfield, Somerset, on Thursday, the hottest June day on record.
